items.label: Member checkout live pass
steps: Open /pricing.html while signed in as a member account.
Start monthly and annual checkout from the public member pricing cards.
Confirm Stripe opens on-origin return URLs and success returns to /app/account/.
expect: Only configured plans are clickable.
Success state lands in account with checkout=success and session_id present.
Account billing mirror reflects the active member plan.

items.label: Business checkout live pass
steps: Open /for-gyms/start.html and capture gym identity with starter and pro flows.
Start checkout with a resolvable tenant slug or tenant id.
Confirm success returns to /biz/account/ without cross-origin drift.
expect: Checkout stays blocked when tenant identity is weak.
Billing mirror resolves to the intended tenant subject.
No BizGym runtime is duplicated during acquisition.

items.label: Billing portal open + return
steps: Open member or business account billing controls.
Launch the Stripe billing portal.
Return to the correct NDYRA account route.
expect: Portal session opens only when Stripe portal configuration exists.
Return path stays inside the matching account surface.
Cancellation/update actions later reflect through webhook sync.

items.label: Token top-up receipt + wallet credit
steps: Buy each token pack from the wallet surface.
Confirm checkout.session.completed creates a token_topups receipt row.
Confirm credit_tokens writes exactly one ledger entry and the wallet balance updates.
expect: Repeated webhook delivery does not double-credit the wallet.
Wallet, purchases, and receipt UI all reflect the same session id.
Token pack price ids must be present for all exposed packs.

items.label: Plan swap entitlement cleanup
steps: Upgrade or downgrade a member or business plan in Stripe.
Wait for customer.subscription.updated or invoice.* events to arrive.
Check subscriptions + entitlements mirrors for the same subject.
expect: Exactly one active plan entitlement remains for the subject family after the swap.
Prior sibling plan entitlements are marked inactive and linked to the replacement.
The active subscription mirror tier matches the active entitlement feature_key.

items.label: Timer pack entitlement + payload access
steps: Purchase a timer pack with tokens.
Reload the timer library and open the entitled payload.
Confirm non-entitled users remain blocked.
expect: purchase_with_tokens grants the timer_pack entitlement exactly once.
The entitled user can access timer_pack_payloads.
Plan-only users without the pack do not get the payload by accident.

items.label: Admin truth surfaces all green
steps: Open /admin/status/, /admin/wiring/, and /admin/execute/ on the deployed host.
Confirm the deployment badge, confidence checklist, and runtime surfaces all agree.
Confirm no placeholder warnings remain in the config warnings panel.
expect: Status badge reads Deployment Ready only when all required runtime sections are green.
Execute page shows no live blockers.
Public config source is API / deploy, not local fallback.

items.label: Final browser / device finish pass
steps: Run the final iPhone, Android, and desktop pass on the deployed target.
Re-check auth, public pricing, account, wallet, purchases, inbox, events, and profile flows.
Run the agreed perf/a11y/browser gates on the live build.
expect: No stale checkpoint labels or cache drift remain.
No browser-specific layout break appears on the public or app surfaces.
This is the final non-code pass before announcement.
